title: OpenAgentic LLM SDK
description: TypeScript SDK for interacting with the OpenAgentic LLM API, including provider-specific adapters for Bedrock and Vertex.

sections.description: Public API surface of the main SDK client class.

sections.title: Provider Adapters
sections.description: Provider-specific adapter classes for Bedrock, Vertex, and other cloud LLM services.
